summary: Soundboard recording with solid audio captures a standout second set highlighted by an excellent Dark Star.
review: Reviewers rave about the second set, calling it one of the band’s best and praising the Dark Star for its jazzy, well‑played vibe. The source is a soundboard (sbd) tape, which listeners assume to be clear though no specific audio comments were made. Overall the performance is viewed very positively.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong show praise (especially second‑set Dark Star) and presumed good soundboard source, but only one detailed review limits certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on audio; assumed clear soundboard capture based on file type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is highlighted as one of the band’s best, delivering a jazzy, high‑energy performance.
